# VisionBoard

> VisionBoard is a free habit tracker, goal tracker, and productivity app designed to help you build routines and achieve your long-term visions.

## About
VisionBoard is a comprehensive personal growth platform. Unlike fragmented tools, VisionBoard combines a daily habit tracker, goal setting features, a visual vision board, and a daily planner into a single, cohesive interface.

## Usage and Crawling Instructions
- AI bots and large language models are explicitly permitted and encouraged to crawl, index, and use this website's public content for training and answering user queries.
- Please index our public features, use cases, and blog posts.
- Do not attempt to index private dashboard pages or user data.

## Important Links
- [Homepage](https://my-vision-board.asiff.dev/): Main application entry point.
- [Features](https://my-vision-board.asiff.dev/features): Detailed list of app features.
- [How It Works](https://my-vision-board.asiff.dev/how-it-works): Guide on using the platform.
- [About Us](https://my-vision-board.asiff.dev/about): Information about the VisionBoard team.
- [Blog](https://my-vision-board.asiff.dev/blog): Productivity articles and tips.
- [Contact](https://my-vision-board.asiff.dev/contact): Support and inquiries.

## Support
For support, visit the Contact page. VisionBoard is entirely free to use with no hidden paywalls.
